description:
You are working as an infrastructure engineer and have just received a raw list of hostnames that were provisioned this morning.  
    The raw list can be found at the absolute path  
        /home/user/provisioning/hosts.txt  

    Your goal:  
    1. Calculate how many times each individual hostname appears in that file.  
    2. Produce a frequency-summary file named  
        /home/user/provisioning/host_frequencies.log  

    Required output format (every detail below is checked by an automated test):  
        • Each line must contain exactly two fields separated by a single SPACE character:  
              <COUNT><space><HOSTNAME>  
        • <COUNT> must be an integer showing how many times the hostname appears.  
        • Lines must be sorted  
              (a) first by COUNT in numeric descending order, then  
              (b) for ties, by HOSTNAME in lexicographic ascending order.  
        • No leading or trailing spaces, tabs, or blank lines are allowed.  
        • A final trailing newline character (Unix line ending) is required after the last line.  

    On successful completion:  
        • /home/user/provisioning/host_frequencies.log exists and strictly follows the format above.  
        • Print the full contents of the newly created /home/user/provisioning/host_frequencies.log to STDOUT so that a human (and our grader) can read it right away.  

    NOTE:  
    • You already have read/write permissions inside /home/user/provisioning.  
    • Only standard GNU coreutils are available; you do not need any additional software.  
    • Do NOT hard-code the answer; derive it from the data in hosts.txt using typical Linux text-processing commands (e.g., sort, uniq).  
    • A couple of simple commands piped together will be enough.
truth:
<!-- Ground-truth data used by the automated grader.  Do NOT reveal anywhere else. -->

    <!-- 1. Pre-existing file that is present before the agent starts -->
    <file path="/home/user/provisioning/hosts.txt"><![CDATA[
web01
db01
web01
web02
db01
app01
web02
web02
db01
]]></file>

    <!-- 2. Expected outcome file that the agent must create -->
    <expected_output_file path="/home/user/provisioning/host_frequencies.log"><![CDATA[
3 db01
3 web02
2 web01
1 app01
]]></expected_output_file>
